events.title: Arbitration and ADR Committee Meeting
events.summary: Private committee meeting for ICC UK Arbitration and ADR members. Invitation-only session for committee members to discuss arbitration and alternative dispute resolution matters. Contact arbitration@iccwbo.uk for access.

events.title: ROAP EMEA 2026 FINALS
events.summary: Finals of the ROAP (presumably a moot or advocacy competition) for the Europe, Middle East, and Africa region, held online.

events.title: Can international law reclaim its authority after failing to prevent or even limit recent international atrocities?
events.summary: Webinar examining whether international law can restore its credibility following recent failures to prevent or limit international atrocities and human rights violations.

events.title: Faster, Leaner, Smarter: Procedures and Tactics for Streamlining Arbitration
events.summary: Arbitration masterclass examining procedures and tactical approaches for streamlining arbitration proceedings. Held at White & Case London offices on 1 July 2026, 15:00 to 17:30 BST.

events.title: Human rights and nuclear legacy in the Marshall Islands
events.summary: Webinar discussing human rights issues and the ongoing nuclear legacy affecting the Marshall Islands and its population.

events.title: IBA Judges Forum: In defence of justice
events.summary: A judicial forum examining challenges to justice systems and the role of judges in upholding the rule of law across jurisdictions.

events.title: Recognition and enforcement of annulled awards: a comparative approach across jurisdictions and strategic considerations
events.summary: Webinar exploring how different jurisdictions handle recognition and enforcement of arbitral awards that have been set aside at the seat of arbitration.

events.title: Arbitration in Challenging Times
events.organiser: Chartered Institute of Arbitrators (CIArb) - London & Qatar Branches
events.summary: Joint international webinar exploring arbitration practice during difficult circumstances, presented by CIArb London and Qatar Branches.

events.title: Young ICCA Workshop - Soft Skills para Profissionais de Arbitragem
events.summary: Soft skills workshop for arbitration professionals conducted in Portuguese, covering practical interpersonal and communication techniques for arbitration practitioners in São Paulo.

events.title: ACI's Forum on Cartels, TCOs & Compliance in Latin America
events.summary: Two-day forum addressing cartels, transnational criminal organizations, and compliance issues specific to Latin America. Hosted at the DC Bar Association with discount available for attendees.

events.title: Corporate Counsel & Compliance Exchange USA 2026
events.summary: Exchange event bringing together Chief Legal Officers, General Counsel, and Chief Compliance Officers from major US corporations to discuss compliance and legal strategy.

events.title: Delos-Y Tokyo Breakfast
events.summary: A networking breakfast for young arbitration practitioners hosted by Delos-Y at Nishimura & Asahi in Tokyo, focusing on dispute resolution and arbitration.

events.title: North East Branch Mock Mediation - Another brick in the wall
events.summary: Interactive mock mediation event combining entertainment, professional development, and practical learning. Hosted by CIArb's North East Branch for members and practitioners.

events.title: North East Branch Mock Mediation - Another brick in the wall
events.organiser: Chartered Institute of Arbitrators (CIArb) - North East Branch
events.summary: Interactive mock mediation exercise combining entertainment, professional development, and practical learning for mediation practitioners in the North East region.

events.title: Walking Through the Ciarb International Arbitration Professional Practice Guidelines
events.organiser: Chartered Institute of Arbitrators (CIArb) - East Asia, UAE, Malaysia & Singapore Branches
events.summary: Joint webinar series by multiple CIArb branches examining the International Arbitration Professional Practice Guidelines and their application in practice.

events.title: 43rd Cambridge International Symposium on Economic Crime
events.organiser: Cambridge International Symposium on Economic Crime
events.summary: Week-long symposium on economic crime at Jesus College, Cambridge. Full programme includes sessions, lunch, cocktails, and dinner. Day tickets and accommodation available. Participants can attend entire week or selected days.

events.title: From Positions to Outcomes: Negotiation in Practice – a Young ICCA Skills Workshop
events.summary: Practical skills workshop on negotiation techniques and strategies for arbitration practitioners, covering transition from positions to outcomes.

events.title: YIAG & CIArb YMG Fireside Chat and Meet & Mingle in Singapore
events.summary: Informal Q&A session with LCIA Director General Kevin Nash and Deputy Director General Jamie Harrison for younger arbitration practitioners in Singapore.

events.title: From Positions to Outcomes: Negotiation in Practice
events.summary: Practical negotiation skills workshop for arbitration advocates, focusing on transitioning from adversarial positions to collaborative outcomes in dispute resolution contexts.

events.title: LCIA Seminar in Singapore
events.summary: Part of Singapore Convention Week. Seminar featuring LCIA Rules introduction, panel discussion, and interactive forum with networking reception.

events.title: LCIA Tylney in Town Symposium in Singapore
events.summary: Interactive symposium during Singapore Convention Week following LCIA's Tylney-style format, with topics submitted by delegates in advance. Open forum discussion on international arbitration issues.

events.title: LCIA Tylney Hall Symposia
events.summary: Two-day symposium at Tylney Hall following the long-established LCIA tradition of open forum discussion, based on topics submitted by delegates in advance.

events.title: YIAG Tylney Hall Symposium
events.summary: Half-day symposium preceding the LCIA Tylney Hall Symposium featuring open forum discussion on topics submitted by delegates in advance.

events.title: Arbitration and ADR Committee Meeting
events.summary: Committee meeting for ICC UK members involved in arbitration and alternative dispute resolution.

events.title: Istanbul Arbitration Days
events.summary: Multi-day arbitration conference and events in Istanbul. LCIA supporting organisation for this regional arbitration gathering in Turkey.

events.title: LCIA Tylney in Town Symposium in Berlin
events.summary: Symposium during Berlin Dispute Resolution Days following LCIA's Tylney-style format, based on topics submitted by delegates. Interactive arbitration discussion.

events.title: LCIA Tylney in Town Symposium in Copenhagen
events.summary: Symposium following the traditional LCIA Tylney-style format, based on topics submitted by delegates in advance. Open forum arbitration discussion.

events.title: Comprehensive Course on International Arbitration
events.organiser: Chartered Institute of Arbitrators (CIArb) - New York Branch & Columbia Law School
events.summary: Four-day intensive course covering the law and practice of international arbitration, co-presented by CIArb New York Branch and Columbia Law School.

events.title: 4th Annual Women in AML & Sanctions Forum
events.summary: Two-day forum focused on anti-money laundering and sanctions issues, providing networking and professional development opportunities for women practitioners at the DC Bar.

events.title: Annual Arbitration & ADR Conference
events.summary: Two-day flagship conference covering current developments in international arbitration and alternative dispute resolution, featuring leading practitioners and arbitrators.

events.title: LCIA Tylney in Town Symposium in Melbourne
events.summary: Symposium during Australia Arbitration Week following LCIA's Tylney-style format, based on topics submitted by delegates. Interactive arbitration discussion.

events.title: Pathways into Mediation
events.summary: Virtual session exploring career pathways and opportunities in mediation practice, providing guidance for professionals interested in developing mediation expertise.

events.title: Annual Arbitration & ADR Conference
events.summary: Flagship annual conference covering current developments, emerging trends, and practical insights in international arbitration and alternative dispute resolution at EY London.

events.title: Dispute Resolution in a Geopolitical World
events.summary: Annual Arbitration and ADR conference examining dispute resolution challenges in the context of geopolitical developments. Takes place at EY London on 14 October 2026, 09:00 to 17:00 GMT.

events.title: Dispute Resolution in a Geopolitical World | Annual Arbitration & ADR Conference
events.summary: Annual flagship conference exploring arbitration and ADR in the context of geopolitical challenges at EY London.

events.title: LCIA - AIEN Joint Conference: Dispute Resolution in the International Energy Business
events.summary: Two-day conference with speaker panels addressing energy dispute resolution topics. Leading advocates, counsel, experts, and arbitrators provide presentations and interactive discussions.

events.title: 15th Anniversary Edition Fraud, Asset Tracing & Recovery Miami
events.summary: Milestone 15th anniversary conference addressing fraud investigation techniques, asset tracing methodologies, and recovery strategies. Two-day program at Grand Beach Hotel Surfside.

events.title: LCIA Tylney in Town Symposium in Miami
events.summary: Interactive half-day symposium during Miami Arbitration Week concluding with cocktail reception. Follows LCIA's Tylney-style format for open forum discussion.

events.title: LCIA Tylney in Town Symposium in New York
events.summary: Interactive symposium during New York Arbitration Week 2026. LCIA Tylney-style format with delegate-submitted topics for open forum arbitration discussion.

events.title: LCIA Tylney in Town Symposium in Miami
events.summary: Interactive half-day symposium during Miami Arbitration Week 2026, ending with cocktail reception. LCIA Tylney-style format with delegate-submitted topics.

events.title: LCIA Symposium in London
events.summary: Full-day symposium during London Arbitration Week following long-established LCIA tradition of open forum discussion. Topics submitted by delegates in advance.

events.title: LCIA Tylney in Town Symposium in London
events.summary: Full-day symposium during London Arbitration Week following the long-established LCIA tradition of open forum discussion based on delegate-submitted topics.

events.title: LCIA Tylney Hall Symposia
events.summary: Two-day symposium at Tylney Hall following the long-established LCIA tradition of open forum discussion, based on topics submitted by delegates in advance.

events.title: YIAG Tylney Hall Symposium
events.summary: Half-day symposium preceding the LCIA Tylney Hall Symposium featuring open forum discussion on topics submitted by delegates in advance.
